name: every supported render mapping declares the complete triple needed to emit and inject: format, target file, and the tool's config flag
command: ruby -ryaml -e 'c=YAML.unsafe_load_file(ARGV[0])["tools"]; bad=[]; c.each{|k,v| r=v["render"]; next unless r; next if r["supported"]==false; bad<<k unless r["fmt"] && r["file"] && r["flag"]}; STDERR.puts("incomplete=#{bad.inspect}"); exit(bad.empty? ? 0 : 1)' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/tool-option-surfaces.yaml" && echo supported-render-complete-triple 1>&2
